name: Rupa & Company Limited
summary: Rupa & Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells hosiery products for men, women, and kids in India and internationally. It offers vests, briefs, drawers, bermudas, capri's, T-shirts, loungers, boxer shorts, sleep wear, socks, and thermals for men; bras, panties, camisole, leggings, T-shirts, capri's, loungers, thermal uppers and lowers, and socks for women; vests, briefs, drawers, T-shirts, bermudas, capri's, loungers, thermals, and socks for kids; and plus baba suits and frocks for toddlers. The company offers its products under names of Frontline, Jon, Air, Macroman, Macroman M-series, Macrowoman W-series, Euro, Bumchums, Torrido, Thermocot, Kidline, Footline, Femmora, Softline, etc. It also generates power through a windmill. The company sells its products through approximately 1,25,000 retail outlets and various e-commerce portals, as well as through 7 exclusive brand outlets and approximately 1000 dealers. Rupa & Company Limited was founded in 1968 and is based in Kolkata, India.
